Foods.name: Hamburger - Normal
Foods.description: Juicy quarter-pound beef patty with crisp lettuce, ripe tomato, and fresh onion on a toasted sesame seed bun.

Foods.name: Hamburger - All the Fixings
Foods.description: Fully loaded quarter-pound burger with melted cheddar, crispy bacon, lettuce, tomato, pickles, and grilled onions.

Foods.name: Hotdog - Loaded
Foods.description: All-beef frankfurter piled high with spicy chili, shredded cheddar cheese, diced onions, and pickled jalapeños.

Foods.name: Hotdog - Plain
Foods.description: Classic all-beef frankfurter served in a warm, steamed poppy seed bun. Simple and satisfying.

Foods.name: Taco - Beef & Cheese
Foods.description: Crispy corn shell filled with seasoned ground beef, melted cheddar, shredded lettuce, and diced tomatoes.

Foods.name: Taco - Chicken with Salsa
Foods.description: Soft flour tortilla loaded with seasoned shredded chicken, fresh pico de gallo, sour cream, and sliced avocado.

Drinks.name: Lemonade
Drinks.description: Refreshing freshly squeezed lemonade made with real lemons and a touch of cane sugar. Served over ice.

Drinks.name: Coke
Drinks.description: Ice-cold Coca-Cola served in a chilled fountain cup or classic glass bottle. The real thing.

Drinks.name: Water Bottle
Drinks.description: Pure natural spring water sourced from mountain aquifers. 16 oz bottle, perfectly chilled.

Snacks.name: Raspia (Fruit Slush)
Snacks.description: Refreshing frozen fruit slushie blended with real raspberry, mango, and passionfruit purée. A customer favorite!

Snacks.name: Chips (Large Bag)
Snacks.description: Generous share-size bag of golden, crispy potato chips. Lightly salted and cooked to perfection.

Snacks.name: Chocolate Bar
Snacks.description: Rich and creamy milk chocolate bar made with premium Belgian cocoa. The perfect sweet treat.

Snacks.name: Mixed Nuts (Small Pack)
Snacks.description: Roasted and salted premium mixed nuts: almonds, cashews, pecans, and peanuts. Protein-packed snack.

Snacks.name: Granola Bar
Snacks.description: Hearty oats-and-honey granola bar with dried cranberries and pumpkin seeds. Great for a quick energy boost.

Breakfast.name: Pancakes
Breakfast.description: Fluffy buttermilk pancakes with maple syrup and butter

Breakfast.name: Bacon & Eggs
Breakfast.description: Two eggs any style with crispy bacon strips and toast

Breakfast.name: French Toast
Breakfast.description: Thick-cut brioche dipped in cinnamon egg batter, grilled golden, topped with berries

Salads.name: Caesar Salad
Salads.description: Romaine lettuce, parmesan, croutons, and house-made Caesar dressing

Salads.name: Grilled Chicken Salad
Salads.description: Mixed greens, grilled chicken breast, cherry tomatoes, cucumbers, balsamic vinaigrette
